description: A portrait-format quote graphic. The upper portion is a photograph of an older woman with short gray hair and dark-framed glasses looking to the side, with a blurred crowd behind her. The lower half is a black panel with a large quotation mark and white serif text reading ICE is there for a reason. They're supposed to be keeping these violent criminals out of our country, attributed in italics to an Angel Mom.
notable_text: ICE is there for a reason. They're supposed to be keeping these violent criminals out of our country.
